coordinateSystem.cellFormat: row-letter + column-number, e.g. A1 is top-left. Suffixes a/b/c are overlapping visual offsets inside the same cell for knot pieces.
coordinateSystem.rows: A is top, then B, C, D, E, F when board has 6 rows.

mechanics.objective: Remove all silver blocker rings and copper goal rings from the board.
mechanics.dragModel: A selected ring projects touch movement onto its exitDirection. If the drag progress passes the release threshold and all requires have been cleared, the ring exits the board in that direction.
mechanics.invalidMove: If the player drags a locked ring or drags against the exitDirection, the piece snaps back with shake feedback.
